creator: rezny@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 179101
update x11-drivers/xf86-video-openchrome to 0.5.0

Update of xf86-video-openchrome to 0.5.0. Build tested with servers 1.18.4 and 1.19.1. This driver is not only for x86 (build verified on ppc64, PCI cards could be plugged into !x86), only the XvMC support is exclusive to x86.
